case_title: TOMMY VONG VS. BRIAN HUANG et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-02-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PLAINTIFF TOMMY VONG'S MOTION TO VACATE SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 1/31/2012 TO TOMMY VONG IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)
